results.rendered_html: kṣema—rāja m. (probably = ˚mendra, q.v.) N. of a Śaiva philosopher (pupil of Abhinava-gupta and author of the Stavacintāmaṇi-vṛtti, the Sva-cchandoddyota, the Parameśa-stotrāvalī-vṛtti, the Paramārtha-saṃgraha-vivṛtti, the Pratyabhijñā-hṛdaya, the Sāmba-pañcāśikā-vivaraṇa, and of other works).
